title: rhigospira quadrangularis
intro: Rhigospira quadrangularis, also known as the Fourangled Rhigospira or Four-angled Rhigospira, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Rhigospira quadrangularis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rhigospira quadrangularis include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Rhigospira quadrangularis, such as infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used in African medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
